questionHtml:
What is a property of arteries?

A. Arteries have elastic walls.

B. Arteries have valves.

C. All arteries carry oxygenated blood.

D. Arteries receive blood from the atria.

meta.title: What is a property of arteries? A. Arteries have elastic walls. B. Arteries have valves. C. All arteries carry oxygenated blood. D. Arteries receive blood from the atria.
